title: acalypha gaumeri
intro: Acalypha gaumeri, also known as Gaumer's acalypha, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha gaumeri include the treatment of fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Acalypha gaumeri include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
